disclaimer: Aggregated ACLR research norms (VALD Research Normative Data Report). Green = at or ahead of the typical ACLR case at this phase (study average); Amber = within 1 SD behind; Red = >1 SD behind. Norms are split by sex; the age band for each metric is shown in its source tag. Note: 9-month norms are male-only in the source; some isokinetic data at initial assessment combine male and female. Absolute force-plate values come from different studies across phases and are NOT directly comparable phase-to-phase — read each phase on its own. Decision SUPPORT only — not return-to-play clearance. Apply clinical judgement.
